title: Zero-Day Exploit & Emergency Patch Response Replay

events.detail: HTTP request matching CVE-2024-3400 exploitation pattern against GlobalProtect portal
w3wp.exe spawns cmd.exe with encoded PowerShell payload
whoami.exe, systeminfo.exe, ipconfig.exe executed from w3wp.exe
Reverse shell established to external C2 server
Web shell cmd.aspx written to C:\inetpub\wwwroot\
Persistence scheduled task created for hourly callback
CLAW: Host contained, virtual patches deployed to WAF
Emergency patch deployment initiated for all vulnerable assets
